items.title: The Verdict Is In: Everyone Hates Southwest’s New Seat And Boarding Rules
items.description: Southwest’s new assigned seating has put its reputation with Americans who have loved the brand through other turbulence at risk.

items.title: How Congress Can Rein In Rogue Federal Judges
items.description: It is time for Congress to rethink its federal statutes that govern the discipline of judges.

items.title: Cuomo Getting A Radio Show Instead Of Prison Proves There’s A Two-Tiered Justice System

items.title: Here’s Where Prosecutors Should Look For More Evidence Of Somali Daycare Fraud
items.description: Prosecuting those involved with sham daycare centers should be relatively easy, using an assortment of readily available financial records.

items.title: If SCOTUS Bans Illegals From The Census, Dems Could Lose Power For Years
items.description: Census figures used for congressional apportionment, redistricting, and redistributing federal funds have historically counted illegal aliens.
